userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 18 IRS fix/fix are not supported in Markitwire
MW id 6.2 Not possible in VCON to book Fixed Fixed XXCY
MW id 9 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 0.0200% on fixed leg 16,000,000 Receive 0.1000% on fixed leg 24,880,000 Expiry 04 jan 2018
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
MW id 17 Start date can not be prior to insertion date unless full coupon is activated
